title: Filter cross-match evidence
$comment: Records the relationship between a survey-specific filter and a standard or reference bandpass. This provides the evidence needed for multi-survey comparisons and simulation validation.

filter_id.description: ID of the survey-specific filter manifest (e.g. 'foundation-g').

standard_band.description: The standard or reference bandpass this filter is matched to (e.g. 'SDSS-g', 'Bessel-V').

relationship.description: The nature of the match. 'identical' if it's the same physical filter/system; 'approximate' if it's a similar band used for comparison; 'transformed' if a recorded color term or shift is required.

transformation.description: Optional transformation parameters (e.g. S-corrections, color terms) if the relationship is 'transformed'.

formula.description: The mathematical formula for the transformation.

reference.description: The publication or source of the transformation parameters.

authority.description: The authority asserting this match (e.g. the survey paper or a cross-match study).
